text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
My mother has been a famous stage actor for as
long as I can remember.

text_block_list.name: Fuji's Mother
text_block_list.text:
"So long as you do not discard your
qualifications, you shall always possess them."

text_block_list.name: Fuji's Mother
text_block_list.text:
"Even if you find yourself without a sword, or
incapable of swiftly attaining your dreams, you
still have a path of your own."

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Her audience of thousands hung onto her every
word.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Her every breath and movement was like that of a
dream to them.

text_block_list.name: Young Fuji
text_block_list.text: One day, I'm gonna be just like her...
Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hyaaah!

Today marks Fuji Kiseki and I's entry into the
Twinkle Series. It is a day worthy of
commemoration.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hahahaha! Not half bad, Fuji! But go faster!
Faster, I say!

Fuji Kiseki has been embroiled in some
experiment by Agnes Tachyon—a rather odd
runner with a penchant for research.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Huff! Puff!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fan A
text_block_list.text: Sigh! Fuji looked so cool sprinting toward the finish after getting pushed to her limits like that!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fan B
text_block_list.text:
And she hasn't even debuted yet! If this is her
now, she's going to be even more incredible
going forward!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
There's quite a crowd gathered. Seems a lot of
people have high hopes for you, Fuji.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, that's true. I happen to be blessed with the
love of many. My fans give me the strength to
keep me going!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Whenever I feel their expectant eyes on me, I
can't help but want to give them a good show.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Well, setting aside your personality quirks
for a moment...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I collected some good data! I needed pre-debut
runners who are able to reach a certain speed!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad there are so many guinea pi—runners
here! I'll be reaching out to you again in the
future!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Sure, anytime!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Ah, by the way. I heard you're taking on the
Twinkle Series today.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Getting lost in thought mid-race is a dangerous
practice. Take care not to get hurt.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha... You noticed that, huh? I guess I've still
got a long ways to go.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
(When I think about what I'm starting today, I
can't help but recall the past...)

text_block_list.name: Young Fuji
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Wasn't Fuji Kiseki great? She really gave it her all!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Right? She's so charming, you can't help but root
for her. I can't wait to see her next show!

text_block_list.name: Young Fuji
text_block_list.text: ...Was that my all?

text_block_list.name: Young Fuji
text_block_list.text:
Mother, do you think I'll be able to become as
good of an entertainer as you one day?

text_block_list.name: Young Fuji
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if I'll ever be able to get lots and lots of
applause like you do...

text_block_list.name: Fuji's Mother
text_block_list.text: Listen, Fuji. You can't keep chasing me forever.

text_block_list.name: Fuji's Mother
text_block_list.text:
There's more than one path in life. You have to
broaden your view.

text_block_list.name: Fuji's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Set your eyes on a destination that you and only
you can reach.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: A destination that only I can reach...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Could I finally be taking the first steps on that
journey?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fans
text_block_list.text: Fujiii!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fan A
text_block_list.text: Your speed trial with Tachyon was amazing!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fan B
text_block_list.text:
I can't wait to see how you'll do in the Twinkle
Series!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Thank you! I'll do my best to meet your
expectations!
Training that day ends on a particularly high note.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hey there, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
There's something I want to say to you, today
being such an important day to us and all.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Is now a good time?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Right now, we're embarking on a journey most
dazzling.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
My goal, of course, is to become the best
entertainer in the world...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
And to that end, there is a peak I simply must
reach in my classic year!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I want to claim the Classic Triple Crown!

The Classic Triple Crown is a title only bestowed
upon those who win the Satsuki Sho, the
Japanese Derby, and the Kikuka Sho.

Few racers have managed to claim such a title,
though many yearn for the honor of bearing it.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'm lucky enough to have a lot of ponies who
believe in me.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I want to make them all proud by reaching that
summit and gifting them with a catharsis most
wonderful!

If she wants to become the world's best
entertainer, then there is no greater stage for a
classic-year racer.

As a trainer, it's my job to match my trainee's
enthusiasm and passion.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Thank you! I knew you'd say that.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Good, now we've settled on our first goal.
choice_data_list: Wait, there are even more goals?!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Of course. Getting the Triple Crown is no more
than the beginning.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
My story can't end so quickly. I'm trying to
overtake an entertainer of legendary status.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
The road will be immeasurably long and full of
thorns. There's even a possibility I'll fail to reach
my goal.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
But as Hamlet said, "If it be not now, yet it will
come—the readiness is all."

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Shirking this challenge isn't an option! That's why
I want to prepare for it together.
She kneels and takes out a single flower.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, will you walk this thorny path alongside
me?

Her eyes sparkle brightly under the glow of the
milky moon. I pluck the flower from her hand in a
mesmerized haze.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Thank you. I'm glad to have you with me.

The head of the flower she gave me droops
elegantly. Its petals are a gorgeous purple.

And so, my days running through the Twinkle
Series with Fuji Kiseki begin.
